name: flowai-plugins
description: AssistFlow framework — Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: flowai-beta
plugins.description: Opt-in beta capabilities not yet promoted to core. Ships the doc-anchors-validate Stop hook (SALP anchor/reference integrity check; Claude Code only), the select-llm-model skill (task-driven LLM recommender; live-fetched leaderboard data), and cross-IDE delegation (ai-ide-runner one-shot relay / fan-out, delegate-to-ide + worker isolated-context subagent).

plugins.name: flowai
plugins.description: Base commands and skills for development workflows (commit, plan, review, init, etc.)

plugins.name: flowai-devtools
plugins.description: Skill and agent authoring tools (engineer-skill, engineer-command, benchmarks, etc.)

plugins.name: flowai-engineering
plugins.description: Procedural engineering knowledge (deep-research, fix-tests, draw-diagrams, write-prd, etc.)

plugins.name: flowai-memex
plugins.description: Memex — long-term knowledge bank for AI agents. Skills that ingest sources, answer questions with citations, and audit the bank for orphans, dead links, and contradictions.

plugins.name: flowai-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript-specific setup skills (code style, strict mode)
